annotation_policy: CMT and Koenigsbergian annotations derived from MIPVU-reviewed metaphorical and uncertain lexical units. Each instance cites at least one MIPVU ID with decision_type in MIPVU_METAPHOR_OR_UNCERTAIN_DECISIONS.

entailments: public safety or republican survival is framed through salvation/rescue
The republic is understood through rescue or salvation from danger.
cmt.rival_reading: The political institution is treated as an entity that can be saved.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule 'fr-rev-public-salvation' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

instances.gloss_notes: English gloss is an analytical aid only; French source text controls.

entailments: oppression and liberation are represented through chains, slavery, riveting, or breaking bonds
Political freedom is understood through slavery and broken bondage.
cmt.rival_reading: Humanity and liberty are political abstractions rather than literal chained bodies in this context.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule 'fr-rev-bondage-liberty' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

instances.gloss_notes: English gloss is an analytical aid only; French source text controls.

entailments: political community or liberty is represented through birth or regeneration
Republican political life is understood through birth and regeneration.
cmt.rival_reading: The referent is political and historical rather than biological.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule 'fr-rev-political-birth' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

instances.gloss_notes: English gloss is an analytical aid only; French source text controls.

entailments: death or bloodshed is framed as the cost that protects liberty, heroes, or the patrie
Republican liberty and patriotic obligation are understood through blood and death.
cmt.rival_reading: The terms may name literal danger, but the local phrasing converts loss into civic-political value.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule 'fr-rev-blood-death-sacrifice' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

instances.gloss_notes: English gloss is an analytical aid only; French source text controls.

entailments: republican commitment is represented through sacrifice or total devotion
Civic obligation is understood through sacrificial offering and self-devotion.
cmt.rival_reading: The passage concerns civic-political commitment, not a literal altar offering.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule 'fr-rev-sacrifice-devotion' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: death is represented as crowning patriotic labor or glory
Patriotic death is understood through crowning honor.
cmt.rival_reading: Death does not literally crown labor; the phrase confers honor and completion.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule 'fr-rev-death-crowning' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.
